relics.name: Ward Stone
relics.description: At combat start, all allies gain 4 Shield.

relics.name: Mending Bead
relics.description: At combat start, heal all allies for 4.

relics.name: Battle Drum
relics.description: Start each combat with +1 energy.

relics.name: Scouting Map
relics.description: Draw 1 extra card at combat start.

relics.name: Gilded Charm
relics.description: Gain +8 gold after each combat.

relics.name: Veteran Sigil
relics.description: Boss rewards always include an upgraded card.

relics.name: Phoenix Feather
relics.description: Once per combat, auto-revive the first downed ally at 50% HP.

relics.name: Thorned Amulet
relics.description: When an enemy attacks an ally, deal 2 damage back to that enemy.

relics.name: Mirror Shield
relics.description: Whenever an ally gains Shield, they gain 3 more.

relics.name: Blood Amber
relics.description: When you play a card, lose 1 HP and gain 1 energy.

relics.name: Poison Fang
relics.description: At combat start, apply 2 Burning to all enemies.

relics.name: Spirit Stone
relics.description: Gain +1 energy per owned relic at combat start (max +3).

relics.name: Bandage Roll
relics.description: After each combat, heal the lowest HP ally for 8.

relics.name: Explorer's Lantern
relics.description: Card rewards offer 1 extra choice.

relics.name: Mana Gem
relics.description: Permanently increase max energy by 1.

relics.name: Lucky Coin
relics.description: Gain 10 gold when entering the shop.

relics.name: Scholar's Notes
relics.description: Gain 5 gold for each unpicked card in rewards.

relics.name: Crystal Ball
relics.description: At combat start, all enemies have +1 cast time.

relics.name: Void Stone
relics.description: At combat start, remove all Shield from enemies.

relics.name: Titan Heart
relics.description: Party max HP increased by 10 for the rest of the run.

relics.name: Frugal Tome
relics.description: Once per floor, use both Heal and Upgrade at rest sites.

relics.name: Rabbit's Foot
relics.description: 10% chance to double any gold gained.

relics.name: Echo Bell
relics.description: First card played each combat that costs 1+ has its effects doubled.

relics.name: Leech Blade
relics.description: When an enemy dies, heal the lowest HP ally for 5.

relics.name: Toxic Vial
relics.description: At combat start, a random enemy gains 3 Burning.

relics.name: Whetstone
relics.description: Attack cards deal +1 damage.

relics.name: Prayer Beads
relics.description: Healing cards restore +2 HP.

relics.name: Ballast Ring
relics.description: Shield cards grant +2 Shield.

relics.name: Quickdraw Glove
relics.description: At combat start, draw 1 extra card.

relics.name: Warden Crest
relics.description: At combat start, the lowest HP ally gains 8 Shield.

relics.name: Glass Caltrops
relics.description: At combat start, all enemies gain Trap 2 for 2 turns.

relics.name: Lantern Oil
relics.description: At combat start, all enemies gain 1 Burning for 3 turns.

relics.name: Hunter's Compass
relics.description: At combat start, a random enemy is Marked for 2 turns.

relics.name: Field Rations
relics.description: After each combat, heal all living allies for 3.

relics.name: Victory Purse
relics.description: Elite and boss fights award +5 gold.

relics.name: Resonant Charm
relics.description: When you prime a class synergy, gain 1 energy if not full.

relics.name: Executioner's Seal
relics.description: The first enemy killed each combat draws 1 card and restores 1 energy.

relics.name: Bottled Storm
relics.description: At combat start, all enemies gain Conductive for 2 turns.

relics.name: Veil Pin
relics.description: The first ally damaged each combat gains 6 Shield after the hit.

relics.name: Split Prism
relics.description: Your first single-target damage card each combat splashes half damage to adjacent enemies.

relics.name: Steadfast Banner
relics.description: When you end a turn with an empty hand, all allies gain 4 Shield.

relics.name: Ashen Contract
relics.description: At combat start, gain 1 energy and each living ally loses 2 HP, never below 1.

relics.name: Mark of the Hunt
relics.description: Single-target damage cards deal +2 damage to Marked enemies.

relics.name: Grave Bell
relics.description: When an ally is downed, draw 2 cards.

relics.name: Synergy Hourglass
relics.description: Class combo primes last 1 additional turn.

relics.name: Lingering Sigil
relics.description: Marked, Conductive, and Blight last 1 additional turn when applied or extended.

relics.name: Gilded Blade
relics.description: Damage cards deal +1 damage per 50g held, up to +6.

relics.name: Prosperity Charm
relics.description: At combat start, all allies gain 1 Shield per 20g held.

relics.name: Golden Idol
relics.description: At combat start, all allies gain +1 max HP per 25g held.

relics.name: Hoarder's Scales
relics.description: Combat rewards grant +1g per 20g held.

relics.name: Fate's Interest
relics.description: Shop boons cost 30g and last 3 turns instead of 1.
